name: Grand Prize Winning Maple Walnut Mousse Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the egg yolks until lemon-colored.
2. Add salt and maple syrup to the yolk mixture.
3. Cook over the top of a double boiler until the yolk mixture thickens.
4. Allow the mixture to cool.
5. In another bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. Using a folding motion, combine some of the cooled yolk mixture with the egg whites and 2/3 of the Cool Whip.
7. Gently fold in the chopped walnuts.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pie shell.
9. Top with the remaining whipped topping, nuts, and chocolate shavings.
10. Cover and refrigerate for a minimum of four hours before serving.
